untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition for 'descending broadening formation' which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). The formation height calculation and horizontal trend line identification are visual/structural pattern elements not available in the indicator set. Additionally, the measure rule for target computation (add/subtract formation height) requires pattern-specific parameters not in the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: This is a chart pattern recognition signal that requires custom pattern detection logic. The entry conditions depend on identifying the formation geometry and breakout direction, and the exit conditions depend on calculating formation height and applying it to a trend line level. Standard technical indicators cannot detect these structural patterns. Implementation would require a dedicated pattern scanner module outside the standard indicator-based rule engine.
